programme.title: Winchester Life

programme.title: Winchester Life

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: The positive impact made by the shooting sports and recreational shooting to people across our country can't be measured in just one story, so we have three. In Florida, Olympian Dania Vizzi trains at her home shooting facility and talk about how she went from ballerina to one of the best shotgun shooters in the world. In Nebraska, firearms instructor Thea Van Syoc has used the disciplines of competitive pistol shooting and training to help shape her life. Finally we'll take a look into the National African American Gun Association and learn how one day at the range for Phillip Smith created the fastest growing firearm organization in the United States.

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Kipper
programme.desc: "Kipper" is an enchanting animated children's series that centers around the whimsical escapades of a lovable dog named Kipper. Alongside his friends, including Tiger the dog, Pig, and Arnold the piglet, Kipper embarks on a variety of adventures that emphasize friendship, curiosity, and the joy of discovery. The show is known for its gentle humor, engaging storytelling, and colorful animation that appeal to preschool-aged children. With each episode, young viewers are invited into Kipper's world where everyday experiences turn into magical explorations, fostering a love for learning and imagination.

programme.desc: Grandma has given Caillou a special spaceship plate. // It's raining outside but there is no stopping Caillou! // After finding a photograph of a four-year-old Dad with a model train set, Caillou and Dad decide to look for it. // When Caillou spots a dog house outside he gets the idea that Gilbert might like a house of his own. // Caillou, Rosie and Mom are having fun at the park when the ice-cream man comes around.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Super Caillou! // Trip On The Subway // Caillou's Race // As Good As New // I, Robot
programme.desc: Caillou just loves his Superbear storybook. // Caillou learns to deal with a change in plans, when Daddy has to use the car. // Caillou is playing a board game with Mom and he gets a little upset. // Caillou learns about 'recycling' -- literally! // When Sarah shows Caillou and Leo her new remote controlled robot, the boys get a great idea to be robots too!

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou's Water Park // Gone Fishing // The Water Goes 'Round // Caillou's Test Drive // A Very Good Swimmer!
programme.desc: Caillou learns that the best fun is made up and not bought and paid for. // Caillou learns about patience when he goes fishing with Daddy and Grandpa at the pier. // Grandma is watching Caillou for the day, and he wants her to play trucks with him. // When their car breaks down, the family goes shopping for a new one. // Caillou gets an introduction to what it means to be handicapped, when, at the pool, he meets Tammy.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou's Horn // The Mighty Oak // Get Well Mr. Hinkle // The Big Boat
programme.desc: When Sarah gives Caillou an old toy horn, Caillou wants to blow it everywhere. // When Mr. Hinkle has a tree cut down, Caillou is afraid his swing tree is next! // When Caillou dresses up like a mailman to deliver Mr. Hinkle's misdirected mail, he finds out Mr. Hinkle is sick. // Caillou and family go on a trip on Helen's boat, an old friend of Mom's.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Something For Everyone // Skating Lessons // Caillou Becomes A Waiter // Sticking To It! // New Clothes
programme.desc: When the park is closed for the day, Caillou's friends come over to his house to play. // When Mom drives Sarah to her skating lesson, Caillou decides he wants to take skating lessons too! // When Mom and Dad are getting ready to go out to a restaurant, Caillou doesn't understand why he can't go too! // When Caillou accidentally breaks one of his toys because his room is a mess, Mom suggests a way to make cleaning up fun. // When Caillou dresses himself, he learns it's okay to change from your favourite shorts when you find out it's cold outside.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Where I Live // A Good Friend // Just Like Me // Just In Time // Mr. Fixit
programme.desc: When an invitation for Clementine's party accidentally ends up at Sarah's, Caillou learns the differences between the addresses of the two homes. // When Leo forgets his brand new toy dinosaur in the park, Daddy and Caillou go looking for it. // When Clementine tells Caillou how much she likes her older brother, Billy, to teach her things, Caillou sets out to teach something to Rosie. // When Caillou's dawdling causes he, Mom and Rosie to be late going to the park, they end up missing Leo. // When the washing machine needs fixing, Caillou ends up helping Bob the repairman.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou Goes Shopping // Caillou in the Bathtub // Caillou Gets Dressed // Caillou's Teddy Shirt // Caillou Goes Round the Block

And for Caillou that means trouble. // Mom's doing the laundry and Caillou decides to get dressed all by himself. // Caillou's favourite shirt has teddy bears all over it. // Caillou has lots of big adventures when he goes round the block by himself for the first time.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Where's Gilbert? // Where I Saw It Last // Lost In The Jungle

programme.sub-title: Everyone's Best // Stronger Every Day // No More Training Wheels

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: My First Signs: See and Sign With Baby
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies love to run round and round Teletubbyland, but stop to watch three children make some modelling dough to play with. The Tubby Toaster makes a big piece of Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little girl have her hair braided by her mum. They put different coloured bands in her hair. In Teletubbyland, Tinky Winky can't sleep. So Dipsy sings a song, his song helps all the Tubbies go to sleep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two girls decorate a pot. Teletubbies love to play, but one by one, their favourite things go missing. Where can they be?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun sliding down into a Hill. They watch children painting circus pictures before the Lion and Bear appear in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Thomas and Jack having fun playing on the beach and building sandcastles. In Teletubbyland the Teletubbies are going round and round.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch three boys fill a sand pendulum and make a picture. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa follow Po everywhere. The animals march through Teletubbyland, before it is time for Tubby Bye-Bye.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go up the slide to see two children help mend a dry stone wall. A wall appears in Teletubbyland. Laa-Laa, Po and Tinky Winky play a game with the wall.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children learn about the colour blue. In Teletubbyland Po is watching the blue sky when it begins to rain.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making Christmas cards. Laa-Laa's present is some lovely decorations. When Noo-Noo tidies them up they tickle his throat, so he throws them out to decorate Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Two children are making Christmas crackers for each other. Dipsy is very pleased to find his present is a cracker. He looks for someone to pull the cracker. It makes a lovely pink bang and the Teletubbies laugh when they fall over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies march up and down a hill and then they watch some children explore the colour pink. Tinky Winky doesn't know how to make Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance an up and down dance. They watch some children painting pictures and patterns on to eggs. In Teletubbyland, Laa-Laa dances with her ball until the magical tree appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies

Spring is a young girl who doesn't want to do her job until Strawberry convinces her that everyone needs Spring's help and shows her that working together can make any job fun!

programme.title: The Big Freeze
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors—the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. “We don't know when the next mail will get through!” It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting! She gets a brainstorm. Cutting up the side of an old broken tennis racket, she attaches the pieces to her rain boots—instant ice skates! Fashionably bundled against the cold, and pulled by butterflies who sail on the wind like kites, she sail-skates down the frozen road, to the amazement of her friends.

programme.title: On Ice
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain—the Berrykins are still working out the bugs. Strawberry reminds them that this is a public area that should be shared, and suggests they work out a schedule.

programme.title: Blippi's Adventure and Discovery Tour
programme.desc: Join Blippi as he embarks on an exciting Adventure and Discovery Tour! Explore the fascinating jobs at Wimbledon, enjoy a fun-filled game of Mini Golf, and cheer on your favorite team at Liverpool FC. Watch Blippi get hands-on with recycling in Smash My Trash, and meet Stanley the Dinosaur for a roaring good time. Each adventure is packed with fun, learning, and new discoveries, making every moment with Blippi an unforgettable experience for kids.

programme.title: Blippi's Learning and Exploration Journey
programme.desc: Set off on a Learning and Exploration Journey with Blippi as he dives into the world of construction vehicles, exploring bulldozers and excavators up close! Discover the wonders of a Children's Museum and learn through play at the Cayton Children's Museum. Get a splash of color and knowledge as Blippi teaches kids about plants and colors in a fun and engaging way. These educational adventures are perfect for curious young minds, making learning exciting and interactive with Blippi.

programme.title: No Blueberry Is an Island
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does, so they can prepare accordingly—they see Strawberry wearing a diving mask and snorkel in the cafe, and race to the lake to practice scuba diving, not knowing she was only slicing onions.

programme.sub-title: Up in the Air // AdDRESSing the Problem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Wakey Wakey // Rules of the Road

But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Gear Up Grand Prix // Chinese New Year
programme.desc: As the Gear Up Grand Prix begins, each of the friends runs into problems and must drop out of the race. Soon, slow and steady Lori is the only one left standing! Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: In Deep Doo-Doo // Rev's Tree Party
programme.desc: When Rev asks to help beautify the town, he insists there's no job too tough! That is...until he finds out he'll be hauling stinky manure. Rev tries to pawn the job off, until Avery tells him the best way to get it done is to just... "doo-doo" it! // When the gang organizes a birthday party for Rev, Avery insists they keep it secret. After hiding Rev's gifts in a tree, they realize the presents are stuck up there and will need to be retrieved-all before Rev figures out what's going on!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Driving Miss Dottie // Follow the Bouncing Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: When Miss Dottie goes missing, Rev and Avery offer to return her to the Rancher's Jamboree! Rumble is star-struck by the show-sheep, until the unlikely duo become friends. Back safe, Miss Dottie takes the stage, this time with her new pal Rumble! // Rev is determined to master Rumble's new wrecking-ball attachment, but things quickly get out of hand when the duo refuse to ask for help. Now they'll need all the help they can get to stop the wayward ball from wrecking all of Fender Bend!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Pond Pirates // The Coolest Girl I Know
programme.desc: When Rev's dad tells about him about treasure sunken in the pond, Rev and Avery set out on a pirate adventure! They outfit Rumble and Alley with new dive equipment to salvage the long-lost toys and cherished memories found within the chest. // When Rev's cousin Katie comes to visit, Avery's jealousy gets the best of her-Avery always thought she was the coolest girl Rev knew! Intent on outdoing Katie, Avery pulls a stunt that she comes to regret.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev finds out that Bo wants to be a Police Kid, he tells a white lie to make him one for a day! Officer Bo takes the new job too far, ticketing everyone-for everything. Rev will have to tell the truth to fix this mess and get his friend back! // At Camp Sleepaway, Bo is homesick. His friends try to lift his spirits, but after a stinky trip to the outhouse, he's had enough! That is...until a suggestion from Rev helps Bo to see the beauty all around. Maybe camp isn't so bad after all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. The Cowboy Kids track down the thieving rabbits and discover they have babies! Now the posse will need to help the rabbits find a better way to feed.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Gear Up Garage Band // First Aid Fun
programme.desc: At band practice, Rumble struggles to control his nervous backfiring, even damaging the instruments by accident! Determined not to give up on the festival, the gang improvises and uses makeshift instruments. They even feature Rumble's nervous twitch! // When Rev and Owen begrudgingly agree to join Bo's First Aid Games, they do everything BUT take the lessons seriously. It isn't long before the boys find out that first aid isn't all fun and games, but it IS totally awesome!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bo to the Rescue // Ice Cream Team
programme.desc: When Bo messes up on a few rescue missions, he decides to quit Bo's Rescue Hotline. Wanting to help their friend, the gang creates fake emergencies for Bo to solve. But as the friends find out, it takes more than trickery to build self-confidence! // As a heatwave hits Fender Bend, Rev and his friends look forward to Ice Cream Dream Day! But when the ice cream truck breaks down, it's up to the gang to find a way to deliver the tasty treats before they all melt.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev, Rumble and their friends help capture a group of wayward llamas, they each try and claim sole credit for the round up. Rev's parents listen patiently to the elaborate tales, each one starring a different hero, before ruling it a team effort! // When Avery creates a magnetic modification for Rumble, it seems to be the perfect solution. Now Rumble can help them tidy up the Gear Up Garage! But things get complicated when Rumble turns into a super-magnet, attracting all kinds of metal debris!

programme.title: Doby & Disy
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Ping and Friends
programme.desc: Follow Ping and her friends as they find musical inspiration in unlikely places!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: TurboZaurs
programme.desc: The adventures of dinosaur's squad transforming into big machines who are willing to solve any difficulties that kids may face in their everyday life.

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Helper Car
programme.desc: Cartoon for kids about helper cars: a fire truck, an ambulance, a police car and a tow truck. Why these cars and trucks are useful? Because they help people and other cars: fire truck can put out fire, ambulance helps people, when they are hurt or sick, it could drive them to the hospital. Police car patrols the city. Tow truck help other cars, when they are broken down. Watch new car cartoon and learn about helper cars!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid

programme.title: Franklin and Friends
programme.desc: "Franklin and Friends," based on the children's book series featuring Franklin, is a computer-animated series geared toward preschoolers that aims to teach the kids lessons. The series follows Franklin the turtle, now older than in the books and previous TV series, as he experiences adventures and achieves milestones in the community of Woodland, learning lessons along the way. Franklin's friends referenced in the title include best friend Bear, problem-solving Snail, practical joker Rabbit, natural leader Beaver, inventive Fox and empathetic Goose. The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!

programme.desc: Om Nom goes on a series of picnics with his friends, and each picnic is special. Before unpacking the food, Handsome needs to preen, and Scientist Nom needs some impressive gadgets for a comfortable stay. Baby Angry brings something more capacious than a picnic basket, and Starra brings a smile to Om Nom's bouquet. And Nibble Nom saves Om Nom and Om Nelle from the last piece of the cake! / Om Nom understands that organizing a party is no small feat. To simplify things, he creates a well-prepared checklist of tasks he needs to accomplish. First on the list is setting the party mood - check! Next, he sends out invitations - check! And let's not forget the scrumptious carrot cake - check! However, Om Nom faces an unexpected obstacle when it comes to choosing the perfect music. Luckily, his loyal friends and neighbours step in to help. Finally, the moment arrives to rejoice and have an amazing time. Hooray, it's party time and everyone gathers to celebrate! / Om Nom gets frustrated waiting in line, so he tries to find ways to make things faster. But his shortcuts lead to unexpected problems. He ends up looking like a watermelon, trying to reach a yummy jar of jam, and even finds himself behind the cashier's counter. Luckily, a helpful friend always comes to his rescue. Wow, it's trickier than he thought! But the real fun is seeing what's inside each package! Hmm, some boxes are very small... do you believe they house super big things inside? Yes, they do! And hey, did that box just move? Yes! There's a package that escapes, initiating a thrilling pursuit. Want to know what's inside it? Let's find out together in this fun story! / Om Nom takes little Nibble Nom to school and is amazed when Nibble Nom crafts fantastic clay creations! Feeling adventurous, he sneaks in, trying his hand as a student. But oh no! Clay is super challenging for Om Nom. And his attempts lead to giggly mess-ups. But as classes roll on, Om Nom gathers clever tricks. So when pals are in a pinch, Om Nom's there, brilliantly using his new skills to the rescue. And as the day ends, a cheeky secret about Om Nom awaits discovery. Want to know what happened? Watch this funny episode!

programme.desc: Young, tech-savvy Dot is a true child of the 21st century -- she is well-versed in technology and has a strong curiosity and thirst for knowledge. She uses electronic devices to help her learn, create and explore, but she always makes sure to unplug and enjoy quality time with friends, family and pet dog Scratch. She explores the world and goes on adventures with her buds, including best friend Hal, and pooch to satisfy her curiosity and find out more about what goes on around her. Dot gets her passion for technology from her techie mother, who develops apps, while her father is more old-school with a love for woodworking and would rather enjoy the simple things in life than be tethered to electronics. The animated series is based on a children's book written by technology advocate Randi Zuckerberg, who calls the titular character "relatable" and says she is "that friend we all have who is energetic, adventurous and imaginative."

programme.title: Another 48 HRS.

The head of internal affairs (Kevin Tighe) wants to prosecute Jack since there was no weapon found on the victim. In order to prove his innocence, Jack rescues ex-convict Reggie Hammond (Eddie Murphy) from a hit ordered by The Iceman. Reggie, who knows the real identity of the criminal, may be Jack's last hope.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Ferris Bueller (Matthew Broderick) has an uncanny skill at cutting classes and getting away with it. Intending to make one last duck-out before graduation, Ferris calls in sick, "borrows" a Ferrari, and embarks on a one-day journey through the streets of Chicago. On Ferris' trail is high school principal Rooney (Jeffrey Jones), determined to catch him in the act.

programme.title: The Truman Show
programme.desc: He doesn't know it, but everything in Truman Burbank's (Jim Carrey) life is part of a massive TV set. Executive producer Christof (Ed Harris) orchestrates "The Truman Show," a live broadcast of Truman's every move captured by hidden cameras. Cristof tries to control Truman's mind, even removing his true love, Sylvia (Natascha McElhone), from the show and replacing her with Meryl (Laura Linney). As Truman gradually discovers the truth, however, he must decide whether to act on it.

programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this Martial Arts film starring Bruce Lee. Tense your whole body, make some strange bird sounds, punch a guy to death while you're not even looking at him, and join Mike, Kevin and Bill for Fist of Fury!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill as they pledge Delta Gamma and get initiated into the Sisters of Death! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about the perils of shoplifting. Watch as teens attempt to steal makeup, records, and even a pocket calculator! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill as they tackle The Myths of Shoplifting.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Scientists try to cure all disease and instead make monsters! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mary Jo and Bridget from RiffTrax.

programme.title: Riding in Cars with Boys
programme.desc: In director Penny Marshall's and producer Jim Brooks' first collaboration since the smash comedy "Big," "Riding In Cars With Boys" is the fresh, funny, touching and unbelievably true story of writer Beverly Donofrio (Drew Barrymore, who ages from 15 to 35 in the role) and her often irreverent, always unique personal journey.

programme.title: Gone Girl
programme.desc: Ben Affleck and Rosamund Pike head an all-star cast in this thriller based on Gillian Flynn's bestseller about a man suspected of wrongdoing when his wife goes missing.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral (2010)
programme.desc: Death at a Funeral is a hilarious day in the life of an American family come together to put a beloved husband and father to rest. As mourners gather at the family home, shocking revelations, festering resentments, ugly threats, blackmail and a misdirected corpse unleash lethal and riotous mayhem.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: A high school baseball coach, injured before making it to the big leagues, gets a second chance at a professional pitching career when he agrees to try out for the majors, but only if his perpetually losing team wins the district championship.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: The Manzoni family, a notorious mafia clan, is relocated to Normandy, France under the Witness Protection Program, where fitting in soon becomes challenging, as their old habits die hard.

programme.title: Riding in Cars with Boys
programme.desc: In director Penny Marshall's and producer Jim Brooks' first collaboration since the smash comedy "Big," "Riding In Cars With Boys" is the fresh, funny, touching and unbelievably true story of writer Beverly Donofrio (Drew Barrymore, who ages from 15 to 35 in the role) and her often irreverent, always unique personal journey.

programme.title: Gone Girl
programme.desc: Ben Affleck and Rosamund Pike head an all-star cast in this thriller based on Gillian Flynn's bestseller about a man suspected of wrongdoing when his wife goes missing.

programme.title: The Gunman
programme.desc: Sean Penn stars as Jim Terrier, an ex-special forces government contractor who is betrayed by the organization he once worked for and must go on the run in a relentless game of cat and mouse across Africa and Europe.

programme.title: Streets of Blood
programme.desc: While investigating the death of his partner, a New Orleans police officer plunges into the city√Üs criminal underworld. Starring Val Kilmer and 50 Cent.

programme.title: Castle Falls
programme.desc: After decades of neglect, Castle Heights Hospital is packed with dynamite and ready to be demolished. However, no one knows that a gang leader, now in prison, hid $3 million in stolen cash inside the building. Now, three desperate parties want the money and have exactly 90 minutes to find it.

programme.title: JCVD
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme gets involved in a bank robbery with hostages situation and reflects about his life during it.

programme.title: Oklahoma! (1955)
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, several farmers, cowboys and a traveling salesman compete for the romantic favors of various local ladies

programme.title: La La Land
programme.desc: Winner of 6 Academy Awards® including Best Director for writer/director Damien Chazelle, and winner of a record-breaking 7 Golden Globe® Awards, LA LA LAND is more than the most acclaimed movie of the year — it's a cinematic treasure for the ages that you'll fall in love with again and again. Emma Stone and Ryan Gosling star as Mia and Sebastian, an actress and a jazz musician pursuing their Hollywood dreams — and finding each other — in a vibrant celebration of hope, dreams, and love.

programme.title: The Groomsmen
programme.desc: A groom (Ed Burns) and his four attendants wrestle with issues related to friendship and maturity a week before the big day.

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: When Shelley (Anna Faris) gets kicked out of the mansion, she's a lost little Bunny in the wilds of Beverly Hills until she stumbles upon the sorriest sorority on campus. Now it's up to her to spruce up the girls and heat up the Zeta house before the University shuts them down.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. The POstables explore the mystery of true love as they deliver divorce papers.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. The POstables are on a mission to deliver a soldier's letter from Afghanistan.

programme.title: The Beach House
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. Cara returns to the scenic Lowcountry to visit her mother.

programme.title: J.L. Family Ranch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Rancher and former sheriff John Landsburg must save his beloved family ranch.

programme.title: Lead with Your Heart
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Two teens hatch a plot to make their parents realize they still love each other.

programme.title: Lost Behind Bars
programme.desc: While researching her latest book, an author learns a death-row inmate is innocent.

programme.title: The Wife He Met Online
programme.desc: A shocking surprise awaits a man (Cameron Mathison) who marries a seemingly perfect woman.

programme.title: Secrets of Eden
programme.desc: A small-town minister (John Stamos) becomes the prime suspect in the deaths of two parishioners.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets: Drew Peterson
programme.desc: In 2007, Drew Peterson was charged for murdering Kathleen, his third wife new interviews with Drew's girlfriend, Nicole Speakman.

programme.title: Lost Behind Bars
programme.desc: While researching her latest book, an author learns a death-row inmate is innocent.

programme.title: Hacksaw Ridge
programme.desc: The true story of Pfc. Desmond T. Doss (Andrew Garfield), who won the Congressional Medal of Honor despite refusing to bear arms during WWII on religious grounds. Doss was drafted and ostracized by fellow soldiers for his pacifist stance but went on to earn respect and adoration for his bravery, selflessness and compassion after he risked his life -- without firing a shot -- to save 75 men in the Battle of Okinawa.

programme.title: Detroit
programme.desc: In the summer of 1967, rioting and civil unrest starts to tear apart the city of Detroit. Two days later, a report of gunshots prompts the Detroit Police Department, the Michigan State Police and the Michigan Army National Guard to search and seize an annex of the nearby Algiers Motel. Several policemen start to flout procedure by forcefully and viciously interrogating guests to get a confession. By the end of the night, three unarmed men are gunned down while several others are brutally beaten.

programme.title: Buried
programme.desc: A civilian truck driver in Iraq, Paul Conroy (Ryan Reynolds) falls victim to a band of insurgents. An unknown length of time later, Paul awakes in a coffin, with little more than a lighter, a cell phone, and his ever-growing anxiety. Faced with a dwindling oxygen supply and a dying battery, Paul must fight panic, despair and delirium as he awaits a rescue that might not arrive in time.

programme.title: Max Steel
programme.desc: Teenager Max McGrath is adjusting to a new school when his body starts to generate strange energy flare-ups that he can't control.

programme.title: Spaceballs
programme.desc: Space hero Lone Starr (Bill Pullman) and his half-canine buddy Barf (John Candy) are on a mission in their flying Winnebago to save Princess Vespa (Daphne Zuniga) from the clutches of Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) in Mel Brooks' inspired sci-fi spoof!

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks
programme.desc: To his family and friends, Cody Banks is a typical teen. But Cody has a secret - he's actually part of an undercover teen CIA program and has 5 years of special training under his belt.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks 2: Destination London
programme.desc: Traveling to London, Agent Cody Banks attends a prestigious school where he gets close to a man who is working with his arch villain Molay.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: After an epic battle, a great city lies in ruins, but the Earth itself is saved. As humanity begins to pick up the pieces, a shadowy group emerges to try to take control of history. Meanwhile, an ancient and powerful new menace sets its sights on Earth. A new group of humans, led by Cade Yeager (Mark Wahlberg), helps Optimus Prime (Peter Cullen) and the Autobots rise up to meet their most fearsome challenge yet: a worldwide war of good versus evil.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sam Witwicky (Shia LaBeouf) and his new girlfriend, Carly (Rosie Huntington-Whiteley), join the fray when the evil Decepticons renew their longstanding war against the Autobots. Optimus Prime (Peter Cullen) believes that resurrecting ancient Transformer Sentinel Prime (Leonard Nimoy), once the leader of the Autobots, may lead to victory. That decision, however, has devastating consequences the war appears to tip in favor of the Decepticons, leading to a climactic battle in Chicago.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Two years after he and his Autobot friends saved the Earth from the Decepticons, Sam Witwicky (Shia LaBeouf) faces a new battle: college. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the Autobots are working with a secret military organization and trying to make a home for themselves on Earth. When an ancient Decepticon known as The Fallen rises up to wreak vengeance, Sam and his girlfriend, Mikaela, must figure out the history of the Transformers on Earth and find a way to defeat The Fallen once and for all.

programme.title: Blue-Eyed Butcher
programme.desc: Susan Wright (Sara Paxton) stands trial for the murder of her husband (Justin Bruening) in their Texas home.

programme.title: Ike: Countdown to D-Day
programme.desc: Gen. Dwight D. Eisenhower (Tom Selleck) faces monumental decisions in the 90 days leading to the Allied invasion of Normandy in 1944.

programme.title: Murphy's Romance
programme.desc: Emma (Sally Field), a divorced single mother seeking to start her life over, moves to a small town in Arizona. She builds a relationship with Murphy (James Garner), the older local pharmacist but, due to his age, it remains platonic. Their friendship becomes complicated when Emma's ex-husband, Bobby Jack (Brian Kerwin), shows up. He claims to have changed his ways, but when he turns out to be the same man Emma divorced, she discovers her true feelings for Murphy.

programme.title: Crossroads
programme.desc: A guitar student (Ralph Macchio) tours the Deep South with an old blues man (Joe Seneca), chasing a lost song written by Robert Johnson.

programme.title: Fire Down Below
programme.desc: A pair of small-time smugglers have a falling out over the love of a sexy, and disreputable woman.

programme.title: Drive A Crooked Road
programme.desc: A seductress dupes an aspiring racecar driver into serving as the wheelman for her boyfriend's bank heist.

programme.title: Three On A Couch
programme.desc: To convince his fiance to marry him, a man must don various disguises to help cure three of her patients.

programme.title: You Were Never Lovelier
programme.desc: Love story and musical set in Latin America.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: Nearly twenty years after the cult TV show Galaxy Quest was cancelled, the alumni cast is asked for help by an alien species in order to save the universe.

programme.title: Summer Rental
programme.desc: This routine comedy is about a series of misadventures during a family vacation at the beach and stars John Candy (who died of a heart attack while filming in Mexico in 1994) as John Chester and Karen Austin as his long-suffering wife Sandy.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: Mike and Carol have just one week to come up with $20,000 in back taxes or they'll lose their house to a neighbor.Even worse, Marcia gets a swollen nose on date night, Cindy's addicted to tattling, and Jan's hearing a psychotic inner voice.

programme.title: A Very Brady Sequel
programme.desc: Mike (Gary Cole) is a planning a surprise wedding anniversary party for Carol (Shelly Long) - until Carol's long-lost first husband, Roy (Tim Matheson), shows up to shake the family tree.

programme.title: Matinee
programme.desc: In October 1962, the Cuban Missile Crisis occurs and the menace of nuclear war looms over the American South. Low-budget filmmaker Lawrence Woolsey (John Goodman) is in Key West, Fla., debuting his new film "Mant!" and thinks the prevailing mood of fear surrounding the premiere is perfect to stir up some excitement. A group of local teenagers (Simon Fenton, Lisa Jakub, Kellie Martin) prepare for the film's opening night, experiencing small crises of their own.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: A Scottish milkman (Max Beesley) manages a soccer team for a match whose outcome determines which of two establishments closes forever.

programme.title: On a Clear Day
programme.desc: After losing his job at a Glasgow shipyard, 50-year-old Frank (Peter Mullan) has few prospects and little hope. A casual remark by a buddy (Billy Boyd) inspires him to find a new purpose: to swim the English Channel. Accompanied by his closest friends, Frank sets forth on a training regimen that will help him achieve his goal.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Darkness (Tim Curry) seeks to create eternal night by destroying the last of the unicorns. Jack (Tom Cruise) and his friends do everything possible to save the world and Princess Lili (Mia Sara) from the hands of Darkness. Enter a world of unicorns, magic swamps, dwarfs and rainbows.

programme.title: Brighton Beach Memoirs
programme.desc: Eugene Jerome (Jonathan Silverman) is a Jewish teen living in an unusually hectic Brooklyn, N.Y., household. His father (Bob Dishy) works two jobs, his mother (Blythe Danner) is a professional worrywart and his widowed aunt (Judith Ivey) has moved in, bringing her two daughters (Stacey Glick, Lisa Waltz). Amidst the constant hurly-burly, Jerome dreams of some day becoming a famous writer, but admits that, in the meantime, he'd settle for seeing his first naked woman.

programme.title: Already Tomorrow in Hong Kong
programme.desc: Ruby (Jamie Chung) and Josh (Bryan Greenberg) spent an unforgettable night together in Hong Kong a year ago, and now their brief encounter is about to get a second chance.

programme.title: Holiday Breakup
programme.desc: A couple falls crazy in love, only to break up right before all the big holiday parties. It's Suckville, so they pretend to still be mad for each other instead of mad at each other. It's the perfect plan-if they don't fall back in love.

programme.title: Christmas Survival
programme.desc: Sisters, Miranda (Gemma Whelan, "Game of Thrones") and Lyla (Joely Richardson) come together for Christmas in this heart-warming holiday comedy. However, ancient sibling rivalries flare-up to sabotage the hope for a season of good will.

programme.title: 12 Days of Christmas
programme.desc: During their first winter break from college, two childhood friends navigate turbulent reunions, unspoken romances, and even an unplanned pregnancy.

programme.title: Hit By Lightning
programme.desc: The loneliest man in North America finally meets the perfect woman but there's only one catch - she's married and wants him to kill her husband.

programme.title: JK's House
programme.desc: At JK's House, Dr. Amber Jenkins and JK blend family values, life lessons, music, and dance.

programme.title: Cowboy & Indiana
programme.desc: With new found hope, former world champion bull rider is given a dangerous shot to regain his former glory.

programme.title: Eat, Love, London
programme.desc: Stella takes a job at a new London restaurant and ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: Dance Together
programme.desc: An injured dancer and a shy Deaf girl overcome bullies, disability stigma, and other high school obstacles.

programme.title: Miss Conspirator
programme.desc: When a women with a panic disorder gets entangled in a 44 million dollars drug deal gone wrong, she is forced to cope with her phobia as police and mafia track her down.

programme.title: Big Bang
programme.desc: Man-su, fired and facing divorce in one day, meets Chul-gon in jail. They escape and become wanted terrorists.

programme.title: Happy Together
programme.desc: A lonely mother, Jung-im unknowingly spends the night with her daughter, Eugene's boyfriend at a club.

programme.title: The Face Reader
programme.desc: King Moonjong brings the skillful face reader to his court to unmask potential traitors threatening his reign.

programme.title: And They Named Her Love
programme.desc: Love, a hopeless romantic painter, sets out on a cross country journey to find herself in the competitive world of artistry. When a near death experience brings Atlanta based songstress Nasada into her life, she goes on a journey to find out that love and business do not always mix.

programme.title: Battered Emotions
programme.desc: Rasheada has accepted that her battle with breast cancer is inevitable but her spiritual fight is still as strong as ever. She continues her upbeat facade for friends and family, but is unsure how long it will be until she can no longer compete with her emotional life's journey. Her sister, Tara, and her best friend, Bunny, struggle with their own issues of inner demons and domestic violence, while trying to support Rasheada through her battle.

programme.title: Cherry Bomb
programme.desc: Party girl Camille is in prison for murdering her best friend and his wife. She believes she's innocent, but doesn't remember what happened the night they were murdered.

programme.title: 1-800 Missing

programme.title: Gold Digga
programme.desc: Maxine is a thriving maneater that lives a lavish life based on the gifts and material things her string of wealthy men gift to her. When she finds her next sugar daddy, she encounters a big problem his wife.

programme.title: Curtis Stigers
programme.sub-title: Curtis Stigers - Fly Me To The Moon
programme.desc: The Danish Radio Big Band joins forces with American vocalist Curtis Stigers to celebrate Frank Sinatra's iconic concerts at The Sands Hotel in Las Vegas. Curtis Stigers and the big band present the most popular evergreens from the American songbook of the 1950s and 1960s, one of which is the classic that lend the concert its name: “Fly Me To The Moon”.

programme.title: Jazzmeia Horn
programme.desc: Vocalist Jazzmeia Horn's 2019 Malta Jazz Festival appearance was a celebration of jazz's future, infused with the soul of its past. Featuring Keith Brown (piano), Rashaan Carter (bass), Irwin Hall (flute and saxophone), and Anwar Marshall (drums), the young singer's performance was a reminder of jazz's enduring power to speak to the heart. Situated at the Valletta waterfront outside Our Lady of Liesse Church, Horn's concert was a truly spellbinding experience.

programme.title: David Linx
programme.desc: This might come unexpected, but the Brussels Jazz Orchestra (BJO) is not the kind of jazz orchestra that sticks to standards. They prefer to achieve the highest level by composing original music, creating unique arrangements, and playing inventively as well as passionately. In fact, it really is jazz with a dynamic orchestral sound, with a classic strength in which each musician is also a brilliant soloist. Call it an ‘orchestrated passion for jazz' that incites BJO to create world-class music. Founded in 1993 by Frank Vaganée, Serge Plume and Marc Godfroid, the Brussels Jazz Orchestra is recognised and has been subsidised by the Flemish Government since. Brussels Jazz Orchestra is orchestra in residence at Flagey in Brussels. During this project the BJO performs with David Linx. The Belgian jazz singer will resort to any idiom, any language, any time signature. Occasionally he seems to dispense with bar lines altogether, or he will go beyond lyrics, as he abandons his own words for some free-wheeling scat.

programme.title: Modern Jazz Quartet
programme.desc: Formed in 1952 from the rhythm section of Dizzy Gillespie's big band, the Modern Jazz Quartet took its inspiration from classical chamber music as well as jazz's blues roots. The group enjoyed a decades-long career with multiple critically acclaimed albums, cementing their place in the history of the genre. Following concerts in Rotterdam and Amsterdam the days before, the Modern Jazz Quartet performed at Singer Concertzaal in Laren for Dutch TV on March 31, 1969. Composed of Milt Jackson on vibraphone, John Lewis on piano, Percy Heath on bass, and Connie Kay on drums, the foursome plays with elegance and style.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: Freddie Hubbard, Al Grey, Alvin Batiste & Al Casey
programme.sub-title: Freddie Hubbard & The Satchmo Legacy Live in 1987
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. This concert of Freddie Hubbard and the Satchmo Legacy in 1987, highlights the bebop legend's classic style and silky tone. Hubbard is an American jazz trumpeter whose unmistakable and influential tone contributed to new perspectives for modern jazz and bebop. He was also a well-known part of Art Blakey and the Jazz Messengers and is primarily known for playing bebop, hard bop, and post-bop styles from the early '60s onwards.

programme.title: Philip Catherine, Jean-Louis Rassinfosse & Chet Baker
programme.sub-title: Jazz a la Grand Place Chet Baker Trio
programme.desc: Two top-tier Belgian musicians – guitarist Philip Catherine and bassist Jean-Louis Rassinfosse – accompany American jazz trumpeter and vocalist Chet Baker during this 1985 performance at the beautiful Brussels Jazz Club, located on the Grand-Place, the Belgian capital's central square. The trio plays Charlie Mariano's “Crystal Bells”, the title track of their acclaimed 1983 album. Other songs played during this legendary concert include “Down” and “How Deep is the Ocean”.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer, Budapest Festival Orchestra & Richard Goode
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphonies and Piano Concerto No. 4
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra (BFO) in a concert program dedicated to the music of Ludwig van Beethoven. The program opens with the composer's Symphony No. 1 in C major, Op. 21. Afterward, Fischer conducts Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 4 in G major, Op. 58, in which Richard Goode features as the soloist. The acclaimed American pianist (1943) is known for his interpretations of the Beethoven repertoire. Goode recorded all five Beethoven piano concertos with the BFO and Fischer, earning him exceptional critical acclaim and a Grammy Award nomination. As an encore, Goode performs the Sarabande from J. S. Bach's Partita in B-flat major, BWV 825. The program closes with Beethoven's famous Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on January 29, 2017.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Quatuor Ebène
programme.desc: Renowned French string quartet Quatuor Ébène marked the 250th birth anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven (1770-1827) with a remarkable project: recording all of the great composer's sixteen string quartets. For five years, violinists Pierre Colombet and Gabriel Le Magadure, violist Marie Chilemme, and cellist Raphaël Merlin immersed themselves in Beethoven's 650 pages of sheet music. Their efforts culminated in the performance of the composer's complete repertoire for string quartet, which covers three decades of Beethoven's musical creativity, during six impressive concerts at Philharmonie de Paris in the autumn of 2020. Quatuor Ébène explored every facet of Beethoven's string quartet repertoire: from the youthful Opus 18 string quartets to the Razumovsky, Harp, and Serioso quartets (Opus 59, 74, and 95) from his middle period, and finally, the depth of his late quartets (Opus 127 to 135). This program features Quatuor Ébène performing Beethoven's String Quartet No. 1 in F major, Op. 18, No. 1 String Quartet No. 10 in E-flat major, Op. 74, "Harp" and String Quartet No. 9 in C major, Op. 59, No. 3, "Razumovsky". This concert performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris on October 13, 2020.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Evgeny Kissin, Theodosia Ntokou & Cristina Marton-Argerich
programme.sub-title: Martha Argerich – A Birthday Celebration - II
programme.desc: On the occasion of her 80th birthday, Argentinian pianist Martha Argerich explored repertoire for piano and violin in this wonderful concert, recorded at Château de Chantilly, France. The ‘Grande Dame' of the piano is joined by various renowned artists, including pianists Evgeny Kissin, Theodosia Ntokou, and Cristina Marton-Argerich, and violinist Maxim Vengerov. On the program are Dmitri Shostakovich's Concertino for two pianos, Op. 94 Frédéric Chopin's Impromptu No. 3, Op. 51, Polonaise No. 6, Op. 53 “Heroic”, and Waltz No. 6, Op. 64 No. 1 Camille Saint-Saëns's Polonaise for two pianos, Op. 77 César Franck's Sonata for violin and piano in A major and Fritz Kreisler's Liebesleid and Schön Rosmarin. This performance was recorded on June 12, 2021.

programme.title: Václav Luks & Collegium 1704
programme.desc: J. S. Bach's six Brandenburg Concerto's belong to his best-known works. The composer wrote these concertos between 1711 and 1720 and dedicated them in 1721 to Christian Ludwig, Margrave of Brandenburg. In celebration of the pieces' 300th anniversary, Czech harpsichordist and conductor Václav Luks and the renowned Baroque ensemble Collegium 1704 recorded all six Brandenburg Concertos on historical instruments in 2021. The concertos are based on the Italian concerto grosso form, in which a group of solo instruments is set against a large ensemble. Bach's Brandenburg Concertos feature remarkable combinations of solo instruments and virtuoso solos. This performance was recorded at the Hall of Mirrors in the Köthen Castle, Germany.

programme.title: Jazz Rock
programme.desc: Jazz rock generally grew out of the artistically ambitious rock subgenres of the late 1960s and early 1970s psychedelia, progressive rock, and the singer-songwriter movement. Jazz rock includes extensive improvisation and features soloists with distinctive sounds. This programme explores the music of artists Steely Dan, Doobie Brothers, Boz Scaggs.

programme.title: The Killers
programme.desc: Rock Am Ring (Nürburgring), Rock Im Park (Nuremberg) is a music festival that takes place annually at the Nürburgring Race Track in western Germany. Featuring The Killers.

programme.title: Lenny Kravitz
programme.desc: Lenny Kravitz has been consolidated as one of the stars that has been in force for a long time, this has led him to appear all over the world and be part of the most popular festivals in the world. This is how on September 26, 2014 he was invited to participate in one of the UK's most popular festivals, the iTunes Festival, giving his audience a great concert at the Roundhouse of London.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Seal
programme.desc: Seals one-of-a-kind soaring, husky baritone voice is perfect for any genre. Hes delighted fans and earned critical acclaim while staying true to classic, honest songwriting in his remarkable two-decade career. And now, hes done it again with the release of his exceptional sixth studio album Soul. Together with legendary music producer David Foster, Seal adds his signature touch to some of the best soul songs ever created. In a stunning performance, Seal evokes an era when music vividly captured emotion and romance. Joined by Foster, as well as a choir and string section, Seal takes on Ann Pebbles I Cant Stand the Rain, Sam Cookes A Change Is Gonna Come, and Harold Melvin and the Blue Notes If You Dont Know Me By Now. Tune in and catch more timeless favorites and hits like Kiss From a Rose.

programme.title: Carrie Underwood
programme.desc: Watch Carrie Underwood performing live at the Apple Music Festival. What a unique concert experience, not only for the fans at the Roundhouse, but also for fans across the globe!

programme.title: Cita a ciegas con un libro

programme.title: El Amor Llama a tu Puerta
programme.desc: Eric Randall, autor de libros de vida para solteros, queda a cargo de su sobrina y sobrino en las festividades. Eric recurre a su amiga April, amante de la Navidad, por ayuda. Protagoniza Jesse Metcalfe y Fiona Gublemann.

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: En 1852, la banda de los comanches del joven Eli se ve obligada a sobrevivir por su cuenta. En 1916, los McCullough buscan a Maria. Jeannie descubre un secreto devastador.

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: En 1852, la tribu del joven Eli se encuentra con soldados que les hacen una oferta inesperada. En 1916, Pete toma una decisión que podría destrozar a la familia.

programme.title: The Son
programme.desc: En 1852, el joven Eli se ve obligado a tomar una decisión importante. En 1916, Eli libra una guerra con Standard Oil, provocando un enfrentamiento con Pete.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: El policía tribal navajo Joe Leaphorn debe resolver crímenes junto a su nuevo ayudante Jim Chee, que vuelve a la reserva por primera vez desde que era niño. Ellos se enfrentarán a fuerzas malignas, terrenales y sobrenaturales.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn y Chee entrevistan al testigo superviviente de los asesinatos del motel Big Rock. Chee se reúne con el forense. La causa de la muerte sigue siendo un misterio. Manuelito realiza un descubrimiento escalofriante.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: La sobrina de Leaphorn celebra su Kinaaldá mientras Leaphorn recupera los cuerpos de las víctimas de asesinato. Manuelito y Chee investigan el paradero de la familia mormona desaparecida.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn sospecha que todos los crímenes ocurridos en la reserva están relacionados. Leaphorn invita a cenar a Chee. Manuelito realiza un descubrimiento.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Mientras custodia a un sospechoso relevante, Leaphorn descubre que detrás de este crimen hay más de lo que hubiera imaginado. Manuelito se enfrenta a sus peores temores. Chee debe elegir entre su carrera y su pueblo.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Un deshielo prematuro hace que el suministro de Morgan caiga en picado Marty caza las bestias de la isla Kodiak y Tom aprovecha al máximo su racha de victorias sin precedentes.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Morgan se resbala navegando por el deshielo que está transformando la naturaleza salvaje de Alaska la caza de altura de Marty lo lleva a la cima de los picos más traicioneros de la isla Kodiak.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Un deshielo prematuro desata a los osos locales semanas antes de lo previsto en la gran cordillera de Alaska la búsqueda de un hogar por parte de Jason finalmente llega a su fin, y la carrera hacia la meta de Eustace y Preston acaba en ruinas.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Los caballos de Morgan desaparecen justo cuando los osos locales se despiertan para la primavera la maratoniana caza del león de Rich se convierte en una persecución épica y Tom va tras la joya de América.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty pone fin a una temporada fallida con una exitosa captura Tom se mantiene firme frente a una poderosa bestia y, en el último episodio de Preston, él y Eustace combaten fuego con fuego.

programme.title: Escape a lo salvaje

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso
programme.desc: Elizondo, uno de los sicarios de Quezada que violó a Anastasia, se lleva el cuerpo de Cardona y a un grupo de prostitutas para celebrar, la agente Corona se infiltra. Anastasia es secuestrada.

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso
programme.desc: Anastasia se burla de Elizondo por mentiroso, cuando él confiesa haber matado a Nataniel. Verónica le dice a Adán y a Conrado que está muy preocupada por los negocios que tienen con Anastasia.

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso
programme.desc: Anastasia adquiere un nuevo centro de operaciones, ella enfrenta a los hijos de Nataniel, Silvana y Elías, quienes quieren su herencia. Conrado confirma la calidad de la mercancía.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Traición con traición se paga y Quintanilla entiende que la vida le pasó factura. Sara llega a su límite con la Tuti, quien puede no ser la única embarazada de la casa.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Manuel va con la Tuti a hacerse la prueba de compatibilidad. Josefina también se hace la prueba de embarazo. Temeroso, Alfredo pone en marcha su próxima misión. El Indio ayuda a Berta.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.desc: El dueño de la cabaña, desde hace 20 años, es un empresario canadiense, y es necesario hablar con él para identificar al secuestrador. Nada ni nadie detiene a Cabrera con ese dato.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.desc: Salvador, cada vez más presionado por quienes lo rodean, tarda más en regresar a la cabaña. Frida ya no tiene alimentos y toma una medida desesperada. Nueva orden de la fiscal para Abelardo.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos: Ataque
programme.desc: Aurelio envía a Chacorta para ajustar cuentas con Leonor e Ignacio por la muerte de Heriberto: la orden es asesinarlos a todos. Ximena está desconsolada, y culpa a su exesposo.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Fernanda prepara una poción letal para Violeta. Samantha y Ángela logran rescatar a Willy de las llamas y él se entera de que Sam es su guardaespaldas. Samantha sufre, no podrá ser madre.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Ángela decide seguir con su marido por su hija. Luis la presiona y confiesa que sería capaz de matar por su mujer y su hija. Samantha y Willy logran llegar a la corte.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: El inspector Marshall le informa a Fernanda que surgieron novedades sobre la investigación. Ángela sale corriendo de la empresa luego de ver a Sol besándose con Juan Marcos. Ángela, a solas con Luis, le pide que deje de fingir.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Interrogan a Ángela sobre la muerte de Isabel Uriarte. La guardaespaldas le confiesa a la persona equivocada que está enamorada de Juan Marcos. Fernanda ordena la muerte de Génesis.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Génesis es el blanco del odio de Fernanda. Luis le informa a Fernanda que no consiguió la gente que ella le había pedido para llevar a cabo el plan de matar a Génesis dentro de la clínica.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Ángela encuentra a Génesis con vida tras el accidente. Génesis le dice a Juan Marcos que Ángela es la única mujer que ella aceptaría cerca de él.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Juan Marcos quiere que Ángela cuide de nuevo a Génesis. Pablo le aclara a Emma que él ha regresado a la mansión Arroyo solo por lo que le pasó a Génesis.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Samantha descubre que el nombre de su hijo es Lucas. Perla le confiesa a Bernardo que Sam y Willy tuvieron un hijo. Ángela no cree en una relación con Juan Marcos.

programme.title: Orcas contra Jorobadas
programme.desc: Los biólogos marinos Eve Jourdain y Richard Kaoliussen han pasado años estudiando orcas en Noruega, donde adaptaron la técnica del carrusel

programme.title: Lobos Marinos contra Orcas
programme.desc: En las profundidades del océano, los ágiles lobos marinos hacen maniobras increíbles para burlar a sus enemigos.

programme.title: Planeta parásito
programme.desc: Los parásitos tienen mala reputación pero son esenciales para un ecosistema saludable en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Encuentros con pulpos
programme.desc: El pulpo es lo más parecido a un alienígena que hemos visto en la Tierra. Viajemos al Oceáno Pacífico para conocer más acerca de ellos.

programme.title: Las superbabosas marinas
programme.desc: Los invertebrados más coloridos del océano, los nudibraquios o babosas de mar, se adaptan increíblemente para sobrevivir en el océano.

programme.title: El renacimiento del bosque subacuático
programme.desc: Los bosques de algas marinas ayudan a albergar mayor variedad y diversidad de plantas y animales que casi cualquier otra comunidad marina.

programme.title: La ciencia de la ternura
programme.desc: La domesticación transformó a los lobos en perros. Nuevos hallazgos muestran que los perros levantan las cejas más que los lobos. ¿Por qué?

programme.title: Antártida: ciencia bajo cero
programme.desc: La Antártida es misteriosa e inexplorada. Científicos del Instituto Antártico Chileno estudian el cambio climático en condiciones extremas.

programme.title: El Amazonas incendiado
programme.desc: Más de 60,000 incendios azotaron el Amazonas en 2019. ¿Qué los causó? ¿Cómo afectarán la crisis climática? ¿Se recuperará el Amazonas?

programme.title: El rescate de un osezno
programme.desc: Casey Anderson se enfrentó con la decisión de dejar que un osezno pardo huérfano muera en la naturaleza o salvarlo.

programme.title: Escuela para ballenas
programme.desc: Sigue a una familia de cachalotes en el corazón del Océano Índico. Daremos a conocer al depredador dentado más grande de la Tierra.

programme.title: Chungungo: la nutria más pequeña del mundo
programme.desc: Los chuchungos, eligen vivir en la parte salvaje de Chile, a lo largo de toda la costa indómita del sur del Océano Pacífico.

programme.title: Explosión de vida
programme.desc: Desde flores salvajes hasta grandes colonias de medusas en Monterrey e increíbles olas que brillan en la oscuridad, esto es California.

programme.title: El mundo submarino secreto
programme.desc: Embárcate en un viaje con el afamado fotógrafo submarino Peter Kragh, mientras explora la costa de California.

programme.title: Laboratorio costero de tsunamis
programme.desc: Los riesgos naturales son un desafío para las comunidades en zonas bajas. Los tifones y los tsunamis amenazan su supervivencia.

programme.desc: This war is a family feud. Two father/son teams go head-to-head to build the ultimate deck for kids. Two decks in two exhausting days - family pride on the line and one kick-ass trophy. The winner of this war is chosen by Decked Out's Paul Lafrance, who seeks the advice of construction expert, and host of Builder Boss, Jim Caruk.

programme.title: Deck Wars

Two unbelievably awesome builders lay everything on the line to try and take home the Deck Wars trophy - and capture a lifetime's worth of bragging rights. Paul and his crack team from Decked Out are Team Black. Bryan and his great construction team are Team Red. The theme for this war is Freestyle - design and build whatever you want. Two totally awesome decks built in just two grueling days. The judges for this war are Income Property's Scott McGillivray, construction guru Damon Bennett, and Builder Boss' Jim Caruk. An epic battle for the ultimate victory.
