programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: Amy always thought that by twenty-five she would have learned to cook. Well, that birthday has come and gone and Amy can barely boil pasta -- let alone prepare a meal. Of course that doesn't mean that she hasn't tried. Her past attempts (and subsequent failures) include flaming grilled cheese and soggy kale pasta with boiled vegetables smothered in kitchen floor dust sauce (Amy tried to wash vegetables after she started cooking them, burnt her fingers and then ended up dropping them on the linoleum). The fact that she never learned is not completely Amy's fault. She grew up in a household where the cardinal rule of meal preparation was “we'll eat whatever will defrost the fastest”. Growing up it was typical for a family meal to consist of hot dogs and an individually wrapped bag of chips. These days, Amy wants to grow up and learn to make healthy well-balanced meals for herself, her partner, Cheryl, and their friends. This is at the forefront of Amy's mind these days because she works part time at a naturopathic clinic where her boss recently asked her why she didn't cook for herself, “after all wasn't she worth it?” And if that wasn't enough to send Amy screaming towards the nearest frying pan then how about the fact that she just got a new job is the assistant to the Dean of George Brown's Culinary Arts Program? Amy needs to learn to cook as soon as possible in order to quell her daily terror of being ‘outed' by the culinary fraud squad.

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: Peter and his son, Dave are a very lucky couple of guys. For years, their respective wife and mother, Vicki, has kept them well fed with an onslaught of gourmet meals. This is just as well because each of the guys is a disaster in the kitchen. Peter claims that he once transformed barbequed sausages into “burnt offerings” and, another time, burnt stewed rhubarb in a non-stick pot so badly that the company that made the cookware refused to honour its' lifetime guarantee. These days, Peter's only signature dish is what he terms, “linguine a la fromage” a.k.a. instant mac'n'cheese. Not to be outdone by his dad, Dave considers his burnt chicken in honey sauce to be his ‘specialty'. And, when left to his own devices, Dave generally subsists on three simple meals cottage cheese & pineapple, apples & peanut butter sandwiches and boiled broccoli. Although the pair consider themselves to be adventurous in many ways (they both enjoy travel, skiing and skydiving), they feel they are finally ready for the ultimate adventure – to learn how to cook something truly impressive for Vicki.

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: Twins, Natalie and Nadine (24) do everything together they share the same degree, the same friends, the same job… and the same avoidance of the kitchen. It's a good thing that they have both their mother and their neighbour, Rathika, to rely on. The two consistently keeps the twins' fridge packed with home-cooked meals ready to heat and eat. When Natalie and Nadine are not busy popping these pre-packaged dishes into the microwave then they are quite content to fill up the rest of their daily menu with fast-food, take-out and micro-waved hot dogs. It isn't even beyond them to eat potato chips for breakfast (that is, when they haven't run out of sugar cereal… sans milk of course after all “it makes it soggy”). However, the girls realize that now that they are living on their own it is high time for them to make the shift from adolescent culinary habits to more adult cuisine. The problem is they haven't got a clue where to begin, although one thing is for sure, if they are going to cook they want it to be fun. Christine will have to work twice as hard as she attempts to help these gals move through their culinary growing pains and get them to keep the fun -- but lose the junk.

programme.title: Fearless In The Kitchen
programme.desc: I.T. Professional and father of two, Darren is extremely active and adventurous. After all he plays volleyball, canoes, bike, snowmobiles, does adventure races and even proposed to Sue, his wife of ten years atop Mt. Kilimanjaro. Although fearless in many areas of his life, he considers himself to be reckless and easily distracted in the kitchen. This may explain his continued history of culinary calamities. From setting his entire barbeque ablaze with unattended chicken on a spit to annihilating a $200 piece of beef tenderloin in a misguided attempt at his mother's famous Beef Wellington (something he has always wanted to make), Darren is a mess in the kitchen – literally… as he drives his wife to distraction with his continual need to dirty every pot in the house. If that wasn't enough, then Darren's struggle to make gravy, which always turns out as a “mud puddle” and his persistent belief that when it comes to garlic, “more is never enough” is prime fodder for a culinary intervention. Christine will have her work cut out for her as she applies the brakes to Darren's ‘full throttle' culinary approach if she ever hopes to help him live up to his life motto of being “In it – to win it!”

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann prepares a southern Italian favorite: Oven Roasted Lamb Shanks. After searing the meat to seal in the juices, she adds a hearty red wine and beef broth sauce, along with carrots and onions for a long, low, slow cook. While that's in the oven she prepares a perfect side of Roasted Fennel and Beans. No time to cook? Make time for this slow-cooked favorite!

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: “Acqua Pazza” is Italian for “Crazy Water” a Neapolitan seafood favorite. Mary shows her students how to simmer fresh codfish over a tomato-based bed of sliced fennel, Castelvetrano olives, capers, garlic, and hot red pepper flakes. While that's cooking away in a covered skillet, Mary Ann and student Mary Ellen prepare shrimp-filled Seafood with Fregola. Enough to go crazy for, right?

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: In a matter of minutes, Mary Ann combines sliced chicken breasts with onions, garlic, and turmeric and into the oven it goes to create her husband's recipe Guy's Chicken with Olives and Turmeric. Then she makes another favorite, Meatballs Milan Style. Stuffed with filled with mortadella, beef, and ham and fried to a crunchy crisp, you'll want seconds, thirds, fourths!

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul cooks four great recipes, Carpaccio of Fresh Kenmare Bay Scallops, Spatchcocked sweet chilli Chicken with warm wraps, Pan fried quail with chargrilled baby gem lettuce and A White Chocolate Risotto. Paul shows you how to remove the entire ribcage of the chicken and also how to perfectly butcher a quail. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul shows you how to cook incredible Lamb and Fennel seed skewers A Classic soup with Goats Cheese Scones A surprise little dish using up leftovers and the most amazing rice dish you'll ever see. All this plus loads of fun along the way in this episode of Treyvaud's Kitchen. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul shows you in this episode that with simple techniques and perfect seasoning, you can create amazing recipes at home with easy to find ingredients. If you can't find one type of pasta, just use another. If you see something you like, just add it in to your favourite recipe. That's the beauty of food – There are no limitations as to what you can cook!! (S1 E02)

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: If you blink you'll miss the first dish!! The fastest and tastiest cooked salmon recipe. A fantastic Portabello Mushroom recipe that both vegetarians and meat eaters will both love. Bruschetta three different ways and finished off with a stunning Mediterranean Pork dish is what is in store throughout this episode of Treyvaud's Kitchen (S1 E04)

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, Paul shows you how to cook an amazing dinner party recipe when he stuffs a whole Haddock, Jamaican style. A really quick sweet chilli chicken salad and then Treyvaud's epic steak sandwich with a Flambé you'll have to see to believe. And to finish off the show, a simple but incredible Plum tart. (S1 E05)

programme.title: Treyvaud's Kitchen
programme.desc: Paul teaches you the history and the anatomy of Venison before cooking a mouth-watering salad with venison loin, pear and blue cheese. Then a great family dinner with Paul's take on Chicken Parmesan. And after showing you just how simple it is to cook Monkfish, Paul finishes the show off with his amazing take on an old Irish classic Bread and Butter Pudding!! (S1 E06)

programme.title: What the Truck?!?
programme.desc: The repo team is back! On the premiere episode of the summer season of Operation Repo, Lou, Matt, Sonia, Froy, and Lyndah are back together and better than ever...although a secret meeting suggests trouble in paradise. This week, the team confronts a shady import/export warehouse filled with unpaid-for cars, a pair of reckless rodeo gals, and a cunning team of car thieves who don't even think twice before running off with the team's truck.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: Viva Las Vegas!
programme.desc: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up, and a ventriloquist's dummy has a nasty attitude that gets on Sonia's bad side. When Froy goes missing, Lou has to pick up the slack in a repo that goes terribly wrong, but when Carlos reveals Froy's true whereabouts tempers ..

programme.title: Matt Vs. Giant Chicken
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy cope with the uncertainty of Lou's condition by liberating a Vespa from a leather-clad biker and his rabble-rousing girlfriend. Then, Matt and Froy head out again to claim a Toyota Yaris from a truant children's entertainer wearing an unexpected outfit. And finally, the whole team heads out to repo more than six cars from an insolvent dealership, with the fate of their leader still in question.

programme.title: Reclaim the Plane
programme.desc: In the premiere of the final season of Operation Repo, the team must recover an airplane and return one-hundred thousand dollars. But after two members of the team bail when it's time to save the company, will the others be able to bounce back in time to avoid a jail sentence?

programme.title: Gypsy Games
programme.desc: When Rusty leads Sonia and Ronnie on a wild goose chase, Sonia loses her cool and puts her foot down with Lou.

programme.title: Hidden Cars and Higher Powers
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get some help from a friendly gardener that lead them to discover a car hidden in the backyard. Next, Matt and Froy go on another repo to repossess from a preacher that believes it would be blasphemy to repo his car. And finally, cops arrive in the middle of what may be Matt and Froy's last repo. Lou has to swoop in and smooth out the situation.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.

programme.title: Inane Clown Posse

programme.title: Life In Miniature
programme.desc: Kath Holden is an artist of the everyday. Inspired by the world around her, Kath's creations are whimsical yet keenly observed, and a far cry from the genteel museum pieces that her contemporaries are producing. A proud Yorkshire woman, Kath reflects on her life and art as she carves a place for herself in the precious world of miniatures. Directed by Ellen Evans.

programme.title: Gotta Groove Records

programme.title: Muxes
programme.desc: In the southern state of Oaxaca where, in the indigenous communities around the town of Juchitán, the world is not divided simply into males and females. The local Zapotec people have made room for a third category, which they call “muxes” - men who consider themselves women and live in a socially sanctioned limbo between the two genders. Directed by Ivan Olita.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: Lorane is a young scientist dedicated to building shelters in the Franco-Swiss mountains for orphaned baby lynx, one of Europe's last great feline species and predators. Lynx are critical to the preservation and growth of Europe's habitats, playing a key role in the wider eco-system. Lorane's passion and commitment to save every last lynx teaches valuable lessons about how animals and humans can learn to live side by side.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: The decline of the pangolin is staggering. Virtually exterminated from all over Asia, it still survives in Africa. But the Asian market demands ever increasing quantities, the value of its scales reaching disproportionate prices. A new symbol of human greed, the animal will not last long. Despite this dire fate, Tessa wants to believe in another future for the pangolin. She joined forces with the Aka pygmies in the great forest of the Congo Basin to come to the aid of this endearing animal, the last vestige of prehistoric times.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.desc: In Madagascar, Mahefa travels through isolated forests to meet the Betsileos, the local populations who participate in her lemur study and preservation program. Threatened by deforestation which is ravaging the entire island, the iconic Malagasy animal suffers from this scourge which also contributes to the worsening of the poverty of the inhabitants. Through real expeditions to the hearts of the forests, Mahefa makes young and old aware of the protection of their environment.

programme.title: Eco-Heroines

programme.desc: Between the plains of the pampas and the peaks of the Andes, the condor, the sacred bird is close to extinction. In Argentina, Vanesa Astore and her team lead a reintroduction program by promoting their reproduction in captivity. In addition to the creation of a network of protected natural areas for the conservation of condors, Vanesa is committed to the fight against the use of toxic baits by cattle breeders.

programme.title: Good Morning
programme.desc: The sound of waves crashing on the shores of Hawaii's Red Sand Beach will energize you for the day to come.

programme.title: Turtle Paradise 1
programme.desc: Leave your worries from the world above behind and dive into a vibrant undersea world inhabited by the iconic sea turtles, for 2 full hours of Nature Relaxation. Captured by filmmaker collaborators Tilo & Yvonne Kühnast, Turtle Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds & calming music for deep relaxation by Jason Stephenson.

programme.title: Hidden Tropical Paradise 2
programme.desc: Have you ever wanted to just escape from it all? Now you can turn any screen into a window to a hidden garden island, located in the the remote north-eastern islands of Fiji. Begin your journey as the sun pierces through trees as vibrant blue waves break on a white sandy beach progress up the island to a lush lookout, and enjoy distant wave breaks, trees and birds, and passing clouds. Finally transport yourself back to the beach as the day continues and end it with a beautiful sunset scene as it falls over a distant mountain. It's 120 minutes of pure nature bliss!

programme.title: Auckland Beaches: New Zealand
programme.desc: Enjoy the relaxing vibe of a day at the beach with a tour of the breathtaking coastlines near Auckland.

programme.title: Shades Of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E6: Shades Of Yellow — Capturing the brightness and joyfulness of yellow through various hues and textures, evoking a sense of warmth, optimism, and playfulness.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E2: Shades of Green — Explore a stunning art collection celebrating the color green. From lush landscapes to abstract works, this collection showcases the versatility and serenity of green in a myriad of artistic expressions.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color: Shades Of Gold E13 — A luminous art collection celebrating fortune, warmth, and the rich glow of possibility. Spanning diverse mediums, each piece shimmers with golden hues, while the soundtrack infuses the experience with lively, mystical charm.

programme.title: Shades Of Color
programme.desc: Shades Of Color S1E13: Shades Of Gold — Experience the opulent allure of an art collection adorned with the lustrous elegance of gold. These works illuminate creativity, from shimmering landscapes to gilded abstractions, embodying the richness of this resplendent hue.

programme.title: Spring Forward
programme.desc: Spring Forward S1E1 — Experience the joy of spring! Bursting with vibrant hues and whimsical strokes, each piece embodies the spirit of new beginnings. Let the colors and creativity transport you to a world of fresh perspectives and blooming possibilities.

programme.title: Spring Forward: Spring Impressions
programme.desc: Spring Forward: Spring Impressions E3 — Celebrate the beauty of spring through the luminous brushstrokes of Impressionism. Featuring works by contemporary artists & old masters, the art is accompanied by contemporary classical music, immersing viewers in the colors & rhythms of the season.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Fashion Edge E2 — A dynamic showcase of cutting-edge pieces that redefine fashion's limits. From bold, innovative patterns to daring silhouettes, be captivated by an explosion of colors and concepts that ignite the senses.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Visual Culture E1 — An energizing experience filled with bold illustrations and street art.
